title: Heim-PC operator hygiene follow-ups
goal: Close the remaining Heim-PC service hygiene gaps found in the 2026-07-08 live audit without weakening Operator Relay boundaries or making blind runtime claims.
completion: Broken cloud mounts either reconnect cleanly or remain disabled without restart loops.
Grabowski operator watchdog probes are non-disruptive and cannot restart a healthy live MCP service because of transient probe failures.
Privileged stale-systemd cleanup has a narrow broker-mediated path or a documented manual path.
Wide Heim-PC listeners are classified as intentional, LAN-only, Tailnet-only, localhost-only or removed.

metadata.source: Live Heim-PC service audit from ChatGPT/Grabowski on 2026-07-08
metadata.verified_listener_hygiene_20260711: OPERATOR-PC-HYGIENE-V1-T004 verified: Infra PR #116 records complete observed wildcard-listener classification, closure of 4173/4174 and loopback-only Leitstand deployment from PR #161. Router forwarding and complete firewall policy remain unverified.
metadata.closeout_status: T004 listener classification and bounded remediation are verified. T005 stale-systemd cleanup remains planned, so the initiative stays active. No permission to disable retained LAN/overlay services, delete worktrees or claim public-ingress absence follows.
